glosses.es: bordear; seguir a lo largo de
glosses.vi: đi dọc theo; chạy dọc theo
glosses.el: πηγαίνω κατά μήκος; εκτείνομαι κατά μήκος
glosses.ro: a merge de-a lungul; a se întinde de-a lungul
glosses.ja: 沿って進む; 沿って伸びる

sentences.target: Je longe le canal jusqu'au pont.

translations.fr: Je longe le canal jusqu'au pont.
translations.en: I’m walking along the canal to the bridge.
translations.es: Camino por el canal hasta el puente.
translations.de: Ich gehe am Kanal entlang bis zur Brücke.
translations.it: Cammino lungo il canale fino al ponte.
translations.yue: 我沿住條運河行到座橋。
translations.ru: Я иду вдоль канала до моста.
translations.pt: Estou caminhando ao longo do canal até a ponte.
translations.he: אני הולך לאורך התעלה עד הגשר.
translations.vi: Tôi đi dọc theo con kênh đến cây cầu.
translations.nl: Ik loop langs het kanaal tot aan de brug.
translations.uk: Я йду вздовж каналу до мосту.
translations.hu: A csatorna mentén sétálok a hídig.
translations.hi: मैं नहर के साथ पुल तक चलता हूँ.
translations.el: Περπατάω κατά μήκος του καναλιού μέχρι τη γέφυρα.
translations.nb: Jeg går langs kanalen til broen.
translations.id: Saya berjalan menyusuri kanal sampai ke jembatan.
translations.sv: Jag går längs kanalen till bron.
translations.ro: Merg de-a lungul canalului până la pod.
translations.cs: Jdu podél kanálu až k mostu.
translations.da: Jeg går langs kanalen til broen.
translations.ja: 運河に沿って橋まで歩いています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular of 'longer' (to go/run along).
Definite article, masculine singular; introduces the direct object noun.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'longe'.
Complex preposition: 'jusque' + contracted 'à le' ('au'); introduces a limit (endpoint) of the path.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'jusqu'au'.

sentences.target: On va longer le mur à gauche.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ va lɔ̃ʒe lə myʁ a ɡoʃ/

translations.fr: On va longer le mur à gauche.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ va lɔ̃ʒe lə myʁ a ɡoʃ/
translations.en: We’re going to go along the wall on the left.
translations.es: Vamos a seguir el muro de la izquierda.
translations.de: Wir gehen an der linken Mauer entlang.
translations.it: Andiamo lungo il muro sulla sinistra.
translations.ko: 우리는 왼쪽 벽을 따라 갈 거예요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们要沿着左边的墙走。
translations.yue: 我哋會沿住左邊嗰幅牆行。
translations.pt: Vamos seguir pelo muro à esquerda.
translations.vi: Chúng ta sẽ đi dọc theo bức tường bên trái.
translations.nl: We gaan langs de muur aan de linkerkant.
translations.hu: A bal oldali fal mentén fogunk menni.
translations.hi: हम बाईं तरफ की दीवार के साथ चलेंगे।
translations.pl: Pójdziemy wzdłuż muru po lewej stronie.
translations.el: Θα πάμε κατά μήκος του τοίχου στα αριστερά.
translations.nb: Vi går langs muren på venstre side.
translations.id: Kita akan berjalan menyusuri dinding di sebelah kiri.
translations.sv: Vi går längs väggen på vänster sida.
translations.ro: Vom merge de-a lungul zidului din stânga.
translations.da: Vi går langs muren til venstre.
translations.ja: 左側の壁に沿って行きます。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun used as subject; commonly means 'we' in speech.
Auxiliary 'aller' in near-future construction (aller + infinitif), present indicative 3rd person singular.
Infinitive verb; complement of 'va' in the near-future periphrasis; main action.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'mur'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'longer'.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Noun within the PP 'à gauche'; functions as an adverbial locator ('on the left').

sentences.target: Nous longeons la rivière ce matin.

translations.fr: Nous longeons la rivière ce matin.
translations.en: We’re walking along the river this morning.
translations.es: Esta mañana caminamos junto al río.
translations.de: Heute Morgen gehen wir am Fluss entlang.
translations.ko: 오늘 아침 우리는 강을 따라 걷고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天早上我们沿着河边散步。
translations.ru: Сегодня утром мы идем вдоль реки.
translations.pt: Esta manhã estamos a caminhar ao longo do rio.
translations.vi: Sáng nay chúng tôi đi dọc theo con sông.
translations.ar: هذا الصباح نحن نسير بمحاذاة النهر.
translations.nl: Vanmorgen lopen we langs de rivier.
translations.uk: Сьогодні вранці ми йдемо вздовж річки.
translations.hu: Ma reggel a folyó mentén sétálunk.
translations.hi: आज सुबह हम नदी के साथ चल रहे हैं।
translations.el: Σήμερα το πρωί περπατάμε κατά μήκος του ποταμού.
translations.nb: I dag tidlig går vi langs elva.
translations.id: Pagi ini kami berjalan menyusuri sungai.
translations.sv: I dag på morgonen promenerar vi längs floden.
translations.ro: În această dimineață mergem de-a lungul râului.
translations.da: Her til morgen går vi langs floden.
translations.ja: 今朝、川沿いを歩いています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, subject, 1st person plural.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural of 'longer'.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'rivière'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'longeons'.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; part of the time expression 'ce matin'.
Common noun, masculine singular; temporal complement.

translations.es: Siga por el lado del parque.
translations.ja: 公園沿いに進んでください。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, subject, 2nd person plural (or formal singular).
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person plural of 'longer'.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'parc'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'longez'.
